title: genista hirsuta subvar. glabior
intro: Genista hirsuta subvar. glabior, also known as glabrous hairy broom or glabrous broom, is a plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae) that is characterized by its shrub-like growth and hairy stems. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Genista hirsuta subvar. glabior include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Genista hirsuta subvar. glabior include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
